interfaces.name: getHomePageHighlights
interfaces.description: Fetch featured case studies, products, and service packages for the homepage hero and highlight sections.

interfaces.name: getPortfolioFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the portfolio grid (industries, years, service types, sort orders).

interfaces.name: listCaseStudies
interfaces.description: List portfolio case studies with filters and sorting for the portfolio page grid.

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Filter by industry enum, e.g., 'restaurant', 'food_beverage', 'healthcare'.

parameters.name: service_type
parameters.description: Filter by service type such as 'branding', 'product_design', 'mobile_app_design'.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'newest_first', 'oldest_first', 'featured'.

interfaces.name: getCaseStudyDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single case study detail page.

parameters.name: caseStudyId
parameters.description: ID of the case study to retrieve.

interfaces.name: addFavoriteItem
interfaces.description: Add a case study or product to the single-user favorites list.

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Type of item to favorite, e.g., 'case_study' or 'product'.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: ID of the CaseStudy or Product being favorited.

interfaces.name: removeFavoriteItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the favorites list.

interfaces.name: listFavoriteItems
interfaces.description: List all favorited items (case studies and products) for the favorites page, optionally filtered by type.

parameters.name: filter_type
parameters.description: Filter favorites by type: 'all', 'case_study', or 'product'.

interfaces.name: getShopCategoriesOverview
interfaces.description: Get main shop categories and a few featured products per category for the shop landing page.

interfaces.name: getShopFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for a given shop category listing page.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Shop category, e.g., 'website_templates', 'digital_downloads', 'ui_kits', 'merchandise'.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products for a shop category with filters and sorting for the product grid.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Product category, e.g., 'website_templates', 'digital_downloads', 'ui_kits', 'merchandise'.

parameters.name: subcategory
parameters.description: Product subcategory such as 'ecommerce', 'portfolio', 'icon_sets', 'ui_kit_bundles'.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Filter by available color, e.g., 'blue', 'red'.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: 'rating_high_to_low', 'rating_low_to_high', 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'newest_first'.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single product detail page.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to retrieve.

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the single-user cart. Creates the cart if it does not exist.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to add to cart.

parameters.name: selected_color
parameters.description: Selected color variant, e.g., 'blue', if applicable.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user cart contents and totals for the cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart line item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a product line item from the cart.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCode
interfaces.description: Apply a promo/coupon code to the current cart and recalculate totals.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Promo code text, e.g., 'WELCOME10'.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get the checkout review summary including cart items, totals, and available delivery options.

interfaces.name: submitCheckoutDetails
interfaces.description: Submit customer details and chosen delivery option for the current checkout review session.

parameters.name: delivery_option
parameters.description: Delivery option enum such as 'standard_digital', 'express_physical', 'pickup', 'other'.

interfaces.name: listServicePackages
interfaces.description: List service packages (e.g., branding packages) for the Services page comparison table.

parameters.name: service_type
parameters.description: Filter by service type such as 'branding', 'product_design'.

interfaces.name: getServicePackageDetails
interfaces.description: Get details of a specific service package for pre-selected project request flows.

interfaces.name: submitProjectRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a project request tied to a specific service package (e.g., branding package).

parameters.name: timeline_option
parameters.description: Timeline enum such as 'two_three_weeks', 'four_six_weeks', 'six_eight_weeks', 'flexible', 'unspecified'.

interfaces.name: submitProjectPlan
interfaces.description: Submit a detailed project planner form for complex projects like multi-industry mobile apps.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Multi-sentence brief referencing insights from case studies.

parameters.name: target_launch_date
parameters.description: Target launch date as ISO-8601 string, e.g., '2025-09-01'.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get tag, category, and year filters for the Blog/Insights listing page.

interfaces.name: listBlogPosts
interfaces.description: List blog/insights posts with filters and sorting for the blog listing page.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter by tag such as 'ux' or 'user_experience'.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'newest_first', 'oldest_first'.

interfaces.name: getBlogPostDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single blog/insights article.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: ID of the blog post to retrieve.

interfaces.name: submitNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Submit a newsletter subscription with chosen interests and frequency.

parameters.name: interests
parameters.description: Array of interest enums such as 'design_tips', 'ux_insights'.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: Newsletter frequency enum: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly'.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes, e.g., including UX post titles.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page including story, values, and expertise.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get contact information and basic metadata for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact or partnership inquiry from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getLegalPolicies
interfaces.description: Get legal and policy texts for the Legal & Policies page, including terms, privacy, and shipping/returns.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current single-user cart or create one if it does not exist.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, discounts, and total after any cart change.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code against date, active status, category applicability, and minimum order amount.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current single-user cart from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _mapEnumToLabel
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to convert enum values (industries, service types, product categories) into human-readable labels for display.
